objective: Brief live vox pops + green-screen comparison films + statics for the JUN26 wave covering need-state, protagonist, format, and SDN sub-case variables.
creative_plan_summary: 3 live vox pops + 6 GS comparison films + 10 statics (incl. 2 variants) = 19 concepts
variables_tested: Need-state, Protagonist, Format (CMPF vs STA), SDN sub-case, Wording (S2 variant), Occasion-cardinality (SDN-MULTI)
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.3 | Messaging System v1.3 | Contrast Doctrine v2.1 | Performance Creative Framework v0.9

objective: Brief 3 AI-rendered films covering: F8 AI mirror of F1 (vox-pop production-method test), F9 travel AI testimonial, F10 family-simultaneity AI testimonial.
creative_plan_summary: 1 AI vox-pop mirror + 2 AI testimonials = 3 concepts
variables_tested: Production method (AI vs LIV via F1×F8), Format (TST) under AI, Layer (L2 TRV vs L3 FAM)
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.3 | Messaging System v1.3 | Contrast Doctrine v2.1 | Performance Creative Framework v0.9

objective: Brief 8 L1-line films (myth-bust narrators, analogy pair, vox pops) testing story structure (QH vs DSC), audience layer (L1 vs L2), and category bridge (WF vs MR).
creative_plan_summary: 5 narrator/TH films + 3 vox pops = 8 concepts (7 L1 + 1 L2 test cell)
variables_tested: Story structure (QH vs DSC), Audience layer (L1 marzi vs L2 zaroorat), Category bridge (WF category-first vs MR mechanic-first)
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.4 (NET, DSC additions) | Messaging System v1.3 | L1 guardrails in brief

objective: Brief L1 statics (learning-only Test 1 wave). Delivered wave evolved into 3 campaign statics + 1 wording A/B + 2 format A/Bs (static vs carousel set).
creative_plan_summary: Doc briefed 7 statics (CREATIVE 1-7); delivered: 9 concepts / 11 files = 3 campaign statics (C) + 6 A/B cells (T) incl. 2 two-card carousel sets.
variables_tested: Headline wording (Home vs ghar ka - T-ART-02), Ad-unit format (static vs carousel - T-FMT-02/03); campaign statics learning-only (T-LRN-01)
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.5 (CAR, S-slot, statics PROT rule)
wave_summary_notes: CAVEAT: Briefed via Unfiltrr statics brief 2026-06-03; brief doc (Tab 1) has been updated massively since briefed - delivered creatives diverge from doc. Registry rows + final filenames are source of truth.

brief_name: Unfiltrr - Comparison Format Test (Mobile vs Wiom, Rs.23)
objective: Test headline structure on a mobile-vs-Wiom value-comparison static: what Rs.23 buys on mobile net (1GB / 1 person / 1 phone) vs Wiom RWGKN (unlimited / whole home / all devices). Broad L3 workaround-displacement appeal.
creative_plan_summary: 4 variants x 4 ratios = 16 files. 2 clean A/B pairs + directional cross-pair.
variables_tested: Headline word order (benefit-first vs price-first, T-ART-03); context clause (duration+price alone vs +category, T-ART-04); cross-pair v1 vs v2 directional only.
wave_summary_notes: Comparative format test tab added to the 3-Jun statics doc ~10-Jun; registered as its own brief instance. Delivery: WIOM Comparison statics drop.

objective: Real NPS-promoter customer testimonials as local-proof statics for the Retargeting campaign (warm pool: serviceable-not-paid + 50%+ ad-engagers). Job = cut the trust/credibility barrier at conversion.
creative_plan_summary: 10 local-proof testimonial statics (real Delhi-NCR customers) x 2 ratios (9x16 master, 1x1) = 20 files. Proof angles: flexibility, experience, travel, household, word-of-mouth, support.
variables_tested: Proof angle (FLEX/EXP/SVC/SOC/TRV/FAM) - concept-level local-proof horse race (T-LRN-03)
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.7 (R objective, L0 stage, FLEX/EXP/SVC/SOC needs, TST story, Local-Proof device)
wave_summary_notes: Local Proof = DEVICE (real-customer PEER + STILL + TST signature), not a need-state. Consent obtained for real names. Video testimonials + hyperlocal creator videos (L2) planned under the same exercise.

brief_name: In-house June Creative Tests (Comparison / Duration / AI-vs-Live)
objective: Three in-house creative tests off the June L1/L2 work: T-LRN-04 comparison statics (vs monthly broadband), T-LRN-05 audience-matched duration-framing packages on the T-043 base, T-AILIVE-02 AI render of Script 4 vs the live master.
creative_plan_summary: Comparison statics (L1+L2, primary+alt) + duration packages on T-043 (L1 marzi / L2 zaroorat, primary+alt) + 1 AI render of Script 4 = 9 concepts across 3 tests.
variables_tested: Comparison approach (directional), duration-framing package (directional), AI vs live production method
supporting_docs: Build Spec + Context tabs; Taxonomy v1.7
wave_summary_notes: T-LRN-04 + T-LRN-05 are directional/benchmarked (not clean tests); T-AILIVE-02 is clean. Concepts briefed, not yet produced.

objective: Brief local creators to make hyperlocal UGC explainer videos in their own city and boli: RWGKN as recharge-based ghar ka net with no monthly commitment, ending on a city-specific app-download CTA. One generic guide; each creator writes and shoots their own script (approved before shoot).
creative_plan_summary: 1 generic creator guide -> N creator videos (1 per creator/city). First: Deepak Mehta / Mathura. 30-45s, phone-shot UGC.
variables_tested: None (not clean tests) - creator/city/script directional learning bucket.
supporting_docs: Taxonomy v1.8 (OBJ=H hyperlocal-creator stream, APPDL CTA, 5_Creator_Registry tab)
wave_summary_notes: Creator-video extension of the Jun-8 local-proof exercise (see BRIEF-UNFLT-20260608, which planned 'hyperlocal creator videos (L2)'). Distinct stream: creator-produced UGC video (vs Unfiltrr statics) and L2 (vs L0). Per-creator scripts/videos in 5_Creator_Registry; canonical concept rows in 1_Creative_Registry as JUN26-H-NNN (own sequence).

objective: Three attributable L1 tests: (1) does the recharge-device land the category [offline panel], (2) isolate the ishaaron winner - combo vs line vs graphic [in-market], (3) does the carousel work on scale.
creative_plan_summary: Test-2 arms B/C/D off T-043 control (line/graphic swaps) + Test-3 scale carousel (C-073, RFM). Test-1 = offline comprehension panel (assets separate).
variables_tested: line vs graphic (T-ART-05); carousel-on-scale (T-LRN-07); device family-lift (offline)
wave_summary_notes: Builds on T-043 (ishaaron winner) + T-046 (carousel). Test-1 is an offline comprehension panel (assets separate, not registered). RFM story code added v2.0 for the category-reframe carousel.

objective: Brief 3 in-house street-style neighbour testimonials (RWGKN): L1 marzi/flex, L2 zaroorat/MCR, L3 whole-family/multi. Shared format, middle explainer beat, and fixed Book Now end slate; layer-specific open + payoff. Hindi, RAW, ~25s.
creative_plan_summary: 3 testimonial videos (L1/L2/L3) x video ratios (1x1, 9x16, 16x9). Replicates a proven street-testimonial reference format. Directional learning (T-LRN-09).
variables_tested: None held - street-testimonial format replication across layers (directional, T-LRN-09)
